description: Establish the Governance Vault and migrate core law documents to sovereign directory.

tasks.description: Create directory structure: governance/constitution, governance/laws, governance/registry, governance/logic
Move ARCHITECTURAL_ANALYSIS.md and PATH_CLARITY_RULES.md from project root to /governance/laws/
Update headers in moved files to reflect new absolute paths.
Generate GOVERNANCE_MANIFEST.json in /governance/registry/ listing all files in the vault.

constraints: Follow PATH_CLARITY_RULES.md explicitly for all operations.
Do not modify any files in the /engine/ directory.
Do not use relative paths in any generated headers or manifest entries.
All file operations must be performed using pathlib.Path.
success_criteria: Both law documents are present in /governance/laws/ and removed from root.
All headers match the new absolute path locations.
